---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What I expected

What should have happened.

## Reproduce

Minimal steps. If possible, the exact `arnie ...` invocation:

```sh
arnie --print "..."
```

## Environment

- arnie version: (run `arnie --version`)
- Node: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / etc.)
- Backend: real Anthropic API / `--dario` / other (`--base-url`)
- Model: (default `claude-opus-4-7` or whatever you passed via `--model`)

## Logs / output

Paste the relevant transcript, error message, or session output. Triple-quote large blocks.

## Anything else

Is this a regression? Started after a specific upgrade? Have a workaround?
